name: Tony's Mom's Lemon Snowflakes
recipeIngredient: 1 package Lemon cake mix with pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the cake mix, whipped topping, and egg. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed until blended. The batter will be very thick and sticky.
2. Drop by teaspoonsful into powdered sugar; roll lightly to coat. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet and bake at 350°F for 10-12 minutes or until lightly browned.
Yields: 5-6 dozen
Source: Eilene Kiger - Blodgett Oregon (Tony Hammerquist's mom!)
